description_long: This is a red pickup truck with a single cab and a spacious open cargo bed at the rear, designed for utility and transport in urban environments. The vehicle features a robust front grille, black bumpers, and side mirrors, with four visible wheels and a raised body typical of pickup trucks. The cab has two doors and is equipped with a windshield and side windows, while the rear cargo bed is open and bordered by high side panels. The truck displays branding and model badges on the side and rear, and the overall design suggests durability and functionality. The exterior is primarily painted in a bright red color, with black and gray accents on the bumpers, wheels, and trim. The interior, though not fully visible, is likely composed of standard automotive materials such as fabric, plastic, and metal.
description: A bright red, single-cab pickup truck with an open cargo bed, black bumpers, and visible branding. It is designed for utility and transport in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the red pickup truck, single cab, and open cargo bed.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the grille, windshield, and headlights, with the cab and side mirrors visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the single cab, open cargo bed, and wheel arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, tailgate, rear bumper, and branding.
